name: GIGABYTE B850 GAMING X WIFI6E ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C+A - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: GIGABYTE B850 GAMING X WIFI6E ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: Full-size ATX AM5 motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5-8200 support, and Wi-Fi 6E for high-performance AM5 builds.
